paper_title: Sediment Core Analysis from Lake Peipsi

methods.description: Process for collecting sediment cores from Lake Peipsi for analysis of ostracods and other sediment characteristics.

steps.description: Four sediment cores from the Estonian side of L. Peipsi were analysed for this research.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment cores from Lake Peipsi

steps.description: Positioning of coring sites was performed with the satellite-based Global Positioning System (GPS).
steps.searchable_summary: use GPS to position coring sites

steps.description: A Russian-type peat corer and a piston corer were used to obtain the samples.
steps.searchable_summary: use peat and piston corers to collect samples

steps.description: Samples were packed into PVC tubes for transport.

methods.description: Measurement of magnetic susceptibility of sediment cores to correlate sediment sequences.

steps.description: Long core magnetic susceptibility of sequences PE-1 and PE-2 was measured on the Bartington MS2B susceptibility meter.
steps.searchable_summary: measure magnetic susceptibility using Bartington MS2B

methods.method_name: Water and Organic Matter Content Analysis
methods.description: Determination of water content and organic matter content in sediment samples.

steps.description: Samples were dried to constant weight at 105 °C to determine water content.
steps.searchable_summary: dry samples at 105 °C to determine water content

steps.description: Organic matter content was measured as loss-on-ignition (LOI) at 500 °C for 2 hours.
steps.searchable_summary: perform LOI at 500 °C to measure organic matter

methods.description: Analysis of ostracod abundance and distribution in sediment samples.

steps.description: Subsampling for calcareous fossils was performed after a pilot study on ostracod abundance.
steps.searchable_summary: subsample for calcareous fossils after pilot study

steps.description: Samples were sieved through a 63 µm mesh sieve and the amount of ostracods was estimated visually.
steps.searchable_summary: sieve samples and visually estimate ostracod amount

steps.description: Ostracod and mollusc shells were picked out under a microscope with a fine water-wet brush.
Ostracods were identified using literature and consulting with experts.
steps.searchable_summary: identify ostracods using literature and expert consultation

steps.description: Ostracod assemblage diagrams were created using TILIA and TGVIEW software.
steps.searchable_summary: create ostracod assemblage diagrams with TILIA and TGVIEW

methods.description: Calibration of radiocarbon dates for data compatibility.

steps.description: 14 C dates were calibrated with the radiocarbon calibration program CALIB 5.10.
